channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: mehdihadeli/awesome-software-architecture
item.description: 🚀 A curated list of awesome articles, videos, and other resources to learn and practice software architecture, patterns, and principles.

item.title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
item.description: A curated list of free courses & certifications.

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: lydiahallie/javascript-questions
item.description: A long list of (advanced) JavaScript questions, and their explanations ✨

item.title: itgoyo/TelegramGroup
item.description: 2024最新悄咪咪收集的10000+个Telegram群合集，附带全网最有趣最好用的机器人BOT🤖【tg百科】

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

item.title: KathanP19/HowToHunt
item.description: Collection of methodology and test case for various web vulnerabilities.

item.title: 996icu/996.ICU
item.description: Repo for counting stars and contributing. Press F to pay respect to glorious developers.
